title: Extension
description: Properties used when generating a WordPress plugin from a Gateway extension. Ordered by how commonly each field appears in real plugins.

description.title: Description
description.description: Short summary shown in the WordPress admin plugin list.

ui.placeholder: A brief summary of what this extension does.

version.title: Version
version.description: Semantic version of the generated plugin.

author.title: Author
author.description: Full name of the plugin author or organisation.

author_uri.title: Author URL
author_uri.description: Website of the plugin author or organisation.

text_domain.title: Text Domain
text_domain.description: Unique slug used for i18n. Typically matches the plugin key.

namespace.title: PHP Namespace
namespace.description: Root PHP namespace for generated plugin classes. PascalCase recommended.

min_wp_version.title: Minimum WP Version
min_wp_version.description: Oldest WordPress version the plugin officially supports.
